title: AI Lead Rescue Mauritius property hero — calm reception interior
description: Full-bleed photo+glass hero background for the AI Lead Rescue Mauritius property page (/lead-rescue/property-mauritius): a calm, premium reception / lounge interior with a marble desk, white orchids, soft daylight, warm wood, and framed Mauritius coastal artworks on the wall. Warm, human, restrained-luxury; no people, no identifiable individuals, no logos, no PII. Responsive AVIF/WebP/JPG derivatives (desktop + 768w mobile) generated from the source.

licence.terms: AI-generated image supplied by the operator for use as the Mauritius property page hero. Treated as a draft placeholder; confirm AI-generation rights and replace with an approved >=2400px master before production sign-off. No identifiable people, no logos, no PII.

accessibility.alt: Calm, premium property reception interior in soft daylight: a marble desk with white orchids, warm wood cabinetry, and framed Mauritius coastal artworks on a pale blue wall.

usage.notes: slot:lead_rescue_property_hero. Full-bleed fixed background under a dark-tinted scrim via PublicMarketingPhotoGlassShell; rendered decoratively (alt="") because the surrounding copy carries the meaning. Dark frosted-glass panels sit above it. REPLACEMENT: to change the hero, add a new derivative set and a new manifest id (e.g. lead-rescue-property-reception-hero-v2), then retire this one — never overwrite a published path.
